name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations nationwide, including online loan options.
description_long: ACE Cash Express operates as a financial services company providing short-term emergency funding and check-cashing solutions to consumers needing quick access to cash. The company has established a nationwide network of physical locations and offers online loan options, positioning itself as an accessible alternative financial services provider. Their service menu includes installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and business services, indicating a focus on underserved populations and those outside traditional banking channels. The company operates in multiple states, though availability varies by location—their website explicitly notes that certain loan products are not available in all states, requiring customers to verify eligibility in their specific jurisdiction. ACE's emergency cash category positioning reflects their core business model of providing fast-access small dollar loans rather than traditional personal lending or credit products.
address: 730 W Stassney Ln Ste 150, Austin, TX 78745

company_info.headquarters: 730 W Stassney Ln Ste 150, Austin, TX 78745

pros: Multiple product options beyond emergency loans, including title loans, check cashing, and bill payment services
Online loan application available for customers who cannot visit physical locations
Established nationwide store network for in-person service and immediate cash access
Dedicated customer service channels with multiple contact methods (phone and email)
Clear transparency about state-by-state product availability to set expectations
Tax services offered, expanding financial assistance beyond pure emergency lending
cons: Website infrastructure issues with broken location pages and 404 errors indicating potential service disruption or outdated site
Product availability severely limited by state regulation—explicitly states certain loan types unavailable in specific states
Temporary location closures (Hurricane Ida reference suggests outdated website not regularly maintained) create service gaps
No transparent APR, fee, or loan term information visible on provided website content
Limited detail available about online loan products, application process, or approval timeline
best_for: Consumers needing same-day or next-day cash for emergency expenses without credit checks
Vehicle owners seeking title-secured loans as collateral-based borrowing alternatives
Unbanked and underbanked populations requiring check cashing and financial transaction services
Individuals needing tax preparation services combined with emergency funding options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing immediate cash shortfalls who have collateral (vehicle) or need check-cashing services, and who may not qualify for traditional bank loans. The primary caveat is that loan availability is highly state-dependent, and prospective customers must verify specific product eligibility in their location before proceeding.
services: Store locator and in-person customer service

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
